title: bulbophyllum vitellinum
intro: Bulbophyllum vitellinum, also known as the Golden Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum vitellinum include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its use in treating various cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tea or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
